briefdescription.para: Maximum Length of GNSS UTC data.
Maximum UE system information band size.
Maximum timeout for DNS queries in milliseconds.
Get the current state of the modem.

simplesect.para: The current state.
0 on success. Otherwise -1 is returned.
0 on success. Otherwise -1 is returned.

briefdescription.para: Forcefully reset the modem by pulling pwrkey for 15 seconds.

simplesect.para: The state of the modem may be undefined after calling this function. Call mdm_sim7080_power_on after force reset.

briefdescription.para: Activates the network operation mode of the modem.

simplesect.para: 0 on success. Otherwise <0 is returned.
The modem needs to be booted for this function to work. Concurrent use of network and gnss is not possible.

briefdescription.para: Stops the networking operation mode of the modem.

simplesect.para: 0 on success. Otherwise <0 is returned.

briefdescription.para: Starts the modem in gnss operation mode.

simplesect.para: 0 on success. Otherwise <0 is returned.
The modem needs to be booted for this function to work. Concurrent use of network and gnss is not possible.

briefdescription.para: Starts the modem in gnss operation mode with xtra functionality.

simplesect.para: 0 on success. Otherwise <0 is returned.
The modem needs to be booted for this function to work. Concurrent use of network and gnss is not possible.
If enabling xtra functionality fails a normal cold start will be performed.

On some modem firmware revisions (e.g. 1951B16SIM7080) power cycling the gnss functionality with an xtra file can cause a hangup of the modem. This can be triggered by calling mdm_sim7080_start_gnss_xtra(), then turning off gnss by calling mdm_sim7080_stop_gnss() and then re-enabling gnss by calling mdm_sim7080_start_gnss_xtra() again. In this case the modem will not respond to commands anymore and every call of a modem function will result in a timeout. In this case the whole modem needs to be power cycled by calling mdm_sim7080_power_off() and mdm_sim7080_power_on(). It is advised to power cycle the modem before using the gnss functionality to avoid hangups.

briefdescription.para: Stops the modem gnss operation mode.

simplesect.para: 0 on success. Otherwise <0 is returned.

briefdescription.para: Download the XTRA file for assisted gnss.

parameterdescription.para: Id of the server to download XTRA file from.
The name of the XTRA file to download.

simplesect.para: 0 on success. Otherwise <0 is returned.

briefdescription.para: Query the validity of the XTRA file.

parameterdescription.para: Difference between the local time and the XTRA inject time in hours.
Valid time of the XTRA file in hours.
Injection time of the XTRA file.

briefdescription.para: Query gnss position form the modem.

simplesect.para: 0 on success. If no fix is acquired yet -EAGAIN is returned. Otherwise <0 is returned.

parameterdescription.para: Buffer structure for sms.

simplesect.para: Number of sms read on success. Otherwise -1 is returned.

The buffer structure needs to be initialized to the size of the sms buffer. When this function finishes successful, nsms will be set to the number of sms read. If the whole structure is filled a subsequent read may be needed.

briefdescription.para: Delete a sms at a given index.

parameterdescription.para: The index of the sms in memory.

simplesect.para: 0 on success. Otherwise -1 is returned.

briefdescription.para: Set the level of one of the module's GPIO pins.

parameterdescription.para: GPIO pin number
New logical level of the GPIO

simplesect.para: 0 on success. Otherwise -1 is returned.
The GPIO will be configured as output implicitly.

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *server, const char *user, const char *passwd, const char *file, const char *path)
memberdef.name: mdm_sim7080_ftp_get_start

parameterdescription.para: The ftp servers address.
User name for the ftp server.
Password for the ftp user.
File to be downloaded.
Path to the file on the server.

simplesect.para: 0 if the session was started. Otherwise -1 is returned.

briefdescription.para: Read data from a ftp get session.

parameterdescription.para: The destination buffer.
Initialize to the size of dst. Gets set to the number of bytes actually read.

simplesect.para: According sim7080_ftp_rc.

briefdescription.para: Read voltage, charge status and battery connection level.

parameterdescription.para: [out] Charge status.
[out] Battery connection level.
[out] Battery voltage in mV.

simplesect.para: 0 on success. Otherwise a negative error is returned.

parameterdescription.para: Destination buffer for information.

simplesect.para: 0 on success. Otherwise a negative error is returned.

briefdescription.para: Get the local time of the modem.

parameterdescription.para: Time structure to fill.

simplesect.para: 0 on success. Otherwise a negative error is returned.
Time is set by network. It may take some time for it to get valid.

briefdescription.para: Set the dns query lookup parameters.

parameterdescription.para: Number of retries per query. Maximum SIM7080_DNS_MAX_RECOUNT
Timeout for a dns query in milliseconds. Maximum SIM7080_DNS_MAX_TIMEOUT_MS

simplesect.para: 0 on success. Otherwise a negative error is returned.

briefdescription.para: Get the dns query lookup parameters.

parameterdescription.para: [out] Number of retries per query.
[out] Timeout for a dns query in milliseconds.

briefdescription.para: Simcom SIM7080 modem public API header file.
